body_txt: A scientist who specializes in building or maintaining robots. If he is a Mad Scientist , this skill will probably manifest as an ability to effortlessly manufacture Mecha-Mooks in bulk. Robots don't have to be his only area of expertise (as a mad scientist, he's probably also an Omnidisciplinary Scientist ), but he's a Robot Master if robot-making is far and away his most commonly displayed skill. For instance, Doctor Doom is a scientist who builds robots periodically, but fellow Fantastic Four enemy the Mad Thinker builds robots virtually every time he appears. More benevolent versions might serve as the Big Good and/or father figure for a heroic robot (or five ). Further creations can serve as additional characters, MacGuffins , or a Monster of the Week if they get highjacked or reprogrammed by people with ill intent. Just building one robot doesn't qualify you for this trope. This is for people whose résumés are more than 50% taken up with robot-building or at least robot-fixing. May or may not overlap with Marionette Master . Many Igors qualify, depending on their bosses' area of expertise. Compare with Drone Deployer and The Turretmaster (for different kind of "robots") and Wicked Toymaker . If you were looking for a robot that is a master, see Master Computer . Not to be confused with the Robot Masters of Mega Man (Classic) , though this trope does apply to their creators.
